about.name: Minjoon Eom
about.bio: I'm Minjoon Eom, a Computer Science student at the University of Washington (Class of 2027) passionate about full-stack development, AI, and building systems that better the world.
about.education: UW Computer Science B.S. (3.7 GPA, Seattle WA)
about.interests: Full Stack Development, Product Management, Human-Computer Interaction, Basketball
about.skills: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, React, Next.js, Docker, AWS

coreThemes.title: Besides Coding
descriptions: When I'm not behind a screen, I'm usually exploring my creative side through painting and digital art. I’m a big believer that technical precision and artistic expression are two sides of the same coin, and I love finding ways to bridge that gap in my personal projects.
I love being outside, and one of the main things I do is go on hikes, especially since I live in Washington State.
